changelog:
## v1.1.0
- Supported Library tab with game cards and CDN header images
- Subnautica 2 entry (AppID 1962700, 50GB, StateFlags 1026)
- Lock overlay on un-unlocked games
- Adw.Clamp centered layout (max 800px)
- Updates tab with version check + changelog display
- Quick Access database games with async header images
- Auto-update AdwBanner with one-click download + restart
- Release date display on library cards
